title: “Super Staff!”
positive: The staff were excellent in every way, always engaged in your stay, lots of information and nothing too much trouble. The location needs understanding its remote and at the very end of a residential no through road, elevated so great views over Capetown. The breakfasts were really good too. Other than breakfast and the delicious high tea there is no other food provision so it's an Uber or Shuttle into town. We didn't find the bed that comfortable but thats probably just us and we weren't a huge fan of the bath shape. We felt safe, valued, cared for and well looked after so a great job by the CH team. Thank you
negative: See above on location issue and the bed/bathroom but we are getting very picky!

title: “Terrible room, noisy and smelly every morning from 7am. 3 star stay for a 5 star price.”
negative: Room was tiny and right above the kitchen, which meant that from 7am every morning the room was filled with the noise and smells from staff making breakfast. Nothing close to a 5 star stay, with management clearly just interested in milking the property for as much money as possible even if that means some rooms are clearly subpar. Very disappointing all round, do yourself a favour and book an actual hotel with better standards across the board.
